prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等北航核心招生专业社会热度 持续高热推荐；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年44.0万人增加约3.6%，竞争基数扩大；北航位于北京，非 广东省内高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在广东物理类招生计划约106人，占其全国总计划比例较小，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移后的回调压力、2026 年招生计划微幅缩减、广东省物理类考生人数增加约3.6%带来的竞争加剧，以及声誉负面事件的轻微抑制效应，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约11 96名，区间1060–1332名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 1480 → 1648 → 1465 → 1822 → 1173, showing a wide fluctuating trend. After the ranking moved back to 1822 in 2024, it significantly advanced to 1173 in 2025, a rebound of about 649 places, with large volatility. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1173. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 111 in 2021, 111 in 2022, 108 in 2023, 108 in 2024, and 107 in 2025, showing a slight annual decrease. The 2026 plan is 106, a reduction of 1 from 2025, a decrease of about 0.9%, which has a minor impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 11th (Top 20), with a continuous upward trend in recent years (15th in 2021 → 11th in 2026). The university's comprehensive strength and reputation are in the top tier domestically. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', mainly involving the teacher Yang Yun's moral misconduct and academic fraud incident, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. The Douyin popularity rating is 'relatively hot' (overall rank 56), with moderate short video exposure. There is no obvious signal of admission gaps for Beihang in Guangdong in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 16 disciplines including Instrument Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Aerospace Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, and Software Engineering A+ were rated A- or above, with extremely outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors at Beihang, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation, continue to be highly recommended with sustained social popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Beihang is located in Beijing, not a university within Guangdong Province, so there is no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong is about 106, accounting for a small proportion of its national total plan, making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction pressure after the significant ranking advance in 2025, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the intensified competition due to a 3.6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, and the mild suppression effect of the negative reputation incident, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1196, with a range of 1060–1332.

If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., within 1050), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Future Aerospace Leading Program and Artificial Intelligence. If the ranking is near the lower limit (e.g., around 1300), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Aerospace and Aviation or Science Experimental Class to ensure admission.
